text.title: Research Repository Setup Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Setting up Dovetail for an indie SaaS
example.note: Scorecard: Dovetail (api 5, ai 4, integrations 5, cost 3, zdr 4); Condens (3/3/3/4/3); Looppanel (3/5/3/3/3). Picked Dovetail. Taxonomy: 47 tags across segment, pain, JTBD, behavior. Access matrix: 3 roles. Ingestion wired: Otter, Looppanel, Intercom, PostHog. 90-day backfill completed (218 sessions, 412 tag applications). Repo live, useful from day 1.
